ogTitle: Darawank vs Darbys Falls: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Darawank and Darbys Falls.
heading: Darawank vs Darbys Falls — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Darawank, New South Wales and Darbys Falls, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Darawank has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Darbys Falls (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Darawank or Darbys Falls safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Darawank has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Darbys Falls scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Darawank scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Darbys Falls scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Darawank or Darbys Falls?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Darawank has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
